title: [📦] Dopamine
description: (ABANDONED) Changes the feel of minecraft without adding any content.
body:
# This project is abandoned! Use FO instead, project in collections instead of modpack now.


A Qol modpack that keeps the game "Vanilla" and gives you, well, Dopamine!

[![Available on Modrinth](https://img.shields.io/badge/Available_on-Modrinth-1bd96a?style=flat&logo=modrinth&logoColor=1bd96a&label=Available%20on&labelColor=26292f&color=1bd96a)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/dopaminepack)

### What does it do?
Dopamine improves game aesthetics and adds utilities that make the game more enjoyable. The aesthetic improvements are in a style that is semi consistent with the minecraft style. The utilities are not cheats or hacks and usually don't result in bans from servers.*

### Why should I download it?
It makes the game look better while still being semi lightweight, and I havent seen both in a pack yet. Its up to you, but if you want those things I would recommend trying it out.

___
*Server rules vary. I consider dopamine to be low-risk, but using mods/modpacks on servers is at your own risk and I am not responisble for if you do get banned.
